title: Author a one-page summary PDF
prompt: Create a clean one-page summary PDF titled Document Summary listing the source PDF title, page count and number of tables; save as output.pdf.

vars.operation: create a clean one-page summary PDF titled Document Summary listing the source PDF title, page count and number of tables; save as output.pdf

files.label: Evaluation of the sugar-sweetened beverage tax in Oakland, United States, 2015–2019
files.note: Used as the source document the summary PDF describes.
